notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor lines out sharply to center fielder Trent Grisham.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bo Bichette. Anthony Volpe scores. Trent Grisham to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bo Bichette. Anthony Volpe scores. Trent Grisham to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Luis Torrens pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Luis Torrens doubles (5) on a ground ball to right fielder Cody Bellinger. Marcus Semien scores. A.J. Ewing scores.

notableEvents.label: Tyrone Taylor pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyrone Taylor homers (3) on a fly ball to left field. Carson Benge scores. Juan Soto scores.

notableEvents.label: Carson Benge walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by left fielder Max Schuemann. Marcus Semien scores. Luis Torrens to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Amed Rosario out on a sacrifice fly to right fielder Carson Benge. Max Schuemann scores. Anthony Volpe to 2nd.

notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Jazz Chisholm Jr. out at 2nd. Ryan McMahon out at 1st.
